title: Finance Leadership Channel
content: #finance-leadership — CFO Arjun Mehta (Oct 2025): Singam Technologies runway extends to 2028 with current burn rate of ₹1.2 Cr/month. Q3 EBITDA target is 24%. Do not share externally.

title: HR Confidential Thread
content: #hr-confidential — HR Director: Planned 8% workforce optimization in Engineering by Q1 2027. Not yet announced. All discussions under strict NDA.

title: Product Sprint Discussion
content: #product-squad — Sprint 42: AI Security Gateway v2.0 launch moved to Q2 2026. MCP connector for Notion delayed by 3 weeks due to API rate limits.
